description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy resembling a bear, featuring a textured gray and white woven fabric covering most of its body. The bear has a large, rounded head with two small, upright ears and a prominent red snout and belly patch made from a different, bumpy-textured material. Its facial features include blue, circular eyes and a blue triangular nose, giving it a playful and friendly appearance. The arms and legs are short and rounded, positioned outward from the body, and the toy sits in a relaxed, upright posture. The back of the toy is plain, with the same gray woven texture as the rest of the body. The overall design is simple and inviting, suitable for children and likely to be found in parks, playgrounds, or urban family spaces.
description: A gray woven stuffed bear with blue eyes, a blue nose, and red textured patches on its snout and belly. It has a friendly, playful appearance and a soft, plush body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face with blue eyes, blue nose, red snout, and red belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, protruding snout, and rounded limbs.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain gray woven texture and the shape of the head and ears.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile and the placement of the limbs and snout.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with round blue eyes and a small blue triangular nose. The lack of a mouth or eyebrows gives it a calm, approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs spread apart, head facing forward.
